~ Kanishka ✨
My Story

I'm an Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering graduate with a deep passion for bridging hardware and software — from embedded systems to full-stack development.

"I thrive at the intersection of circuits and code — designing robust systems from the physical layer up to the cloud."

I believe technology should solve real-world problems elegantly, combining hardware precision with software scalability to deliver robust end-to-end solutions.

10+
Projects Completed
4+
Years of Study
5+

Education

Academic Journey

2020 — 2024
B.E. in Electronics & Telecommunication
Engineering College, Pune
Specialization in embedded systems, VLSI design, digital communication and signal processing. Final year project on IoT-based smart systems.
CGPA: 8.5+
2018 — 2020
HSC — Science (PCM)
Junior College, Maharashtra
Completed higher secondary education with focus on Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics. Strong foundation in analytical thinking and problem-solving.
Distinction
Portfolio

Selected Projects

01 ——
ExoSeekers
AI-powered exoplanet transit detection pipeline developed for the ISRO Bharatiya Antariksh Hackathon 2026. Processes NASA TESS light curve data through a 4-stage pipeline (astrophysical filters → BLS/TLS detection → physics-based parameter estimation → 1D CNN + XGBoost classifier) to surface prime candidate targets.
Tech Stack
React 18 TypeScript Flask 1D CNN XGBoost Recharts
02 ——
Dropout Prediction System
AI-powered early warning system identifying at-risk JEE prep students using ensemble ML models. Composite 0-100 risk scoring engine across 17 behavioral/academic features with SHAP-based explainable AI. Full-stack architecture with FastAPI backend, React frontend, PostgreSQL, JWT auth, and role-based access control. Automated PDF/Excel reports and scheduled reassessment via APScheduler.
Tech Stack
Python FastAPI React XGBoost Docker
03 ——
AI Knowledge Assistant
RAG-based knowledge assistant providing context-aware document QA and semantic search capability. Implements an efficient backend utilizing ChromaDB vector store, local Ollama models, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and a responsive Next.js user interface.
Tech Stack
Next.js FastAPI ChromaDB Ollama PostgreSQL Python
04 ——
Heat Doctor / Urban Heat Digital Twin
Urban heat digital twin platform developed for the ISRO Bharatiya Antariksh Hackathon 2026. Integrates satellite thermal maps and meteorological sensor arrays into a sleek dark navy glassmorphic visualization interface utilizing Framer Motion and Recharts.
Tech Stack
React TypeScript Tailwind CSS Framer Motion Recharts shadcn/ui
05 ——
Crop Survey
A spatial analysis and crop health assessment system utilizing satellite imagery and IoT soil parameters to classify crop yield prospects. Implements a classification pipeline for digital mapping of crop stress with an interactive GIS web interface.
Tech Stack
Python TensorFlow Leaflet.js PostgreSQL Django Rasterio
06 ——
Forest Fire Detection
Early forest fire monitoring system integrating remote multi-sensory IoT nodes (telemetry for temperature, humidity, and CO2 sent over LoRaWAN) with an aerial drone image processing pipeline utilizing YOLOv8 object detection model inference.
Tech Stack
PyTorch YOLOv8 LoRaWAN ESP32 FastAPI React

Experience & Projects
2025 — 2026
ExoSeekers & Urban Heat Digital Twin
ISRO Bharatiya Antariksh Hackathon
Developed ExoSeekers (an AI exoplanet transit pipeline) and Heat Doctor (urban heat digital twin platform) utilizing satellite datasets, ML classifiers (1D CNN + XGBoost), and React/FastAPI.
2023 — 2024
Edge AI Predictive Maintenance
Tata InnoVent / Final Year Project
Implemented a vibration-based fault detection digital twin system on Raspberry Pi 4 using 1D CNN + LSTM model networks, winning accolades for Edge AI innovation.
Summer 2023
Internship — Embedded Systems
512 Army Base Workshop
Completed vocational training on maintenance, servicing, and testing of defense communication systems, radar telemetry networks, and optoelectronic weaponry components. Analyzed sensor calibrations and signal feeds to ensure operational readiness.
